---
title: <i class="bi bi-bank2"></i> ICPMF
format: html
---

## ICPMF Bylaws

Bylaws approved and adopted by ICPMF to regulate its operations.

[<i class="bi bi-file-earmark-arrow-down-fill"></i> View or Download Bylaws (PDF)](files/ICPMF-Bylaws.pdf){target=_blank}

## Hosting the ICPMF conference

Procedure to apply and selection criteria for organising the next ICPMF conference.

[<i class="bi bi-file-earmark-arrow-down-fill"></i> View or Download Selection Criteria (PDF)](files/ICPMF-ConferenceOrganizationSelectionCriteria.pdf){target=_blank}


### Example of ICPMF hosting proposal

Example of proposal of a former candidate granted the hosting of the ICPMF conference.
 
 [<i class="bi bi-file-earmark-arrow-down-fill"></i> View or Download Example Proposal (PDF)](files/Example-ICPMF-proposal.pdf){target=_blank}
